warnings: MET emits violation observations only; it does not enforce, decide, or approve. CDE is the canonical decision authority and SEL is the canonical enforcement authority.
Violations are derived from the absence of governed-loop artifacts (AEX/PQX/EVL/TPA/CDE/SEL legs) for AI programming work items.
When upstream evidence is absent, this record does not infer that the leg is present; missing artifacts surface as missing legs.
failure_prevented: AI programming (Codex + Claude) repo mutations passing through the dashboard without an artifact-backed AEX → PQX → EVL → TPA → CDE → SEL trail being silently rendered as PASS.
signal_improved: Each AI programming work item that bypasses any required core-loop leg surfaces as a named violation with the missing leg, agent type, and next recommended input.

violations.why_it_matters: AEX is the admission/intake leg. Without a governed AEX record for this Claude-driven repo mutation, downstream legs cannot be lineage-bound to a structured input.
violations.next_recommended_input: Produce an AEX intake record naming work_item_id=AEX-PQX-DASH-02 and link it as an upstream source for the PQX execution record.

violations.why_it_matters: PQX is the sole execution authority. A repo-mutating change with no PQX execution record cannot be replayed and bypasses the only governed execution boundary.
violations.next_recommended_input: Emit a PQX execution record for the dashboard files written under this work item; link AEX upstream and EVL downstream.

violations.why_it_matters: Codex-authored repo mutations without a lineage record cannot be tied to AEX/PQX/EVL artifacts; downstream certification cannot prove the loop was traversed.
violations.next_recommended_input: Backfill a lineage_record entry for the Codex precursor work item linking AEX intake → PQX execution → EVL evaluation.

violations.why_it_matters: CDE is the sole control-decision authority. Without a control_decision artifact for this work item, no allow/warn/freeze/block has been recorded and promotion cannot be governed.
violations.next_recommended_input: Request a CDE control_decision_record for AEX-PQX-DASH-02 and forward EVL/TPA evidence for adjudication.
